parsed.production_notes: The video features natural human movements, genuine facial expressions, and spontaneous laughter. Lighting and shadows are consistent with a typical indoor environment, and there are no visual artifacts typical of AI generation.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with a slim build and fair complexion. He has short, dark brown hair styled slightly forward and a thin, dark mustache. His facial features are defined, and he appears relaxed and playful.
characters.wardrobe: He is wearing a plain white short-sleeved t-shirt with a small, indistinct red logo on the left chest.
characters.demeanor: Playful, slightly self-deprecating, and good-natured while struggling with pronunciation.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, straight, dark brown hair parted down the middle. She has a clear complexion and a warm, expressive face.
characters.wardrobe: She is wearing a black spaghetti strap top and a white smartwatch on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Supportive, amused, and confident in her pronunciation.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, plain white wall and slanted ceiling, daytime lighting. A black gaming chair is visible.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man and woman are sitting close together indoors, framed in a medium close-up selfie style. The man is positioned on the left, seated in a black gaming chair with a high back. The woman sits closely beside him on the right. Both are looking downwards towards the center foreground, as if focusing on a device held just out of frame. The man moves his mouth to speak, followed shortly by the woman. They both exhibit relaxed, happy expressions, smiling and laughing together. The background consists of a plain, light-colored wall and a slanted ceiling, illuminated by soft, natural-looking daytime light.

scenes.visual_description: The video shows a couple sitting together, with a large language learning app interface overlaid in the bottom center of the screen. Text labels at the top identify the man as 'Immigrant Boyfriend' and the woman as 'Native Girlfriend', with 'American accent app' written between them. The app displays the word 'sixth'. The man tries to pronounce it, and the app shows a 64% score with a red background. The woman then pronounces it, and the app shows a 99% score with a green background and confetti.

Character B says: Sixth. [Sixth.]
